name: Research with AI, Cambium Academy Course 03
description: Completed the full learning path of Cambium Academy Course 03 (v2, the complete 2026 AI research toolkit): the 10-module lecture, all 24 flashcards, all five hands-on AI Lab games, and a 20-question quiz passed at 70% or better. Approximately 3 instructional hours. July 2026 curriculum snapshot with public sources.

criteria.narrative: Read or watch the full 10-module lecture; clear all 24 flashcards (flip required before marking); win all five AI Lab games (Citation Hunt, Lateral Race, Receipts-or-Vibes, Pick Your Instrument, Prompt Surgery); then pass the 20-question quiz at 70% or better. The quiz stays locked until every prior step is complete. Holders who also pass The Practical (an optional honors exam graded against the live Crossref registry) carry a FIELD-VERIFIED mark on their certificate.
